meta.notes: Each url points to a public product or app entry. Optional logoHost overrides the hostname used for the small favicon logo when the link lives on a subdomain (e.g. a pricing path) or you want a clearer mark.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.summary: Conversational model for explanation, drafting, and coding help with a dedicated chat experience.

tools.name: Claude
tools.summary: Assistant for long context, analysis, and careful reasoning through the web app.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.summary: Google’s multimodal assistant, integrated with Google account workflows.

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot
tools.summary: Web copilot for search, summaries, and image generation in the Edge ecosystem.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.summary: Answer engine that cites web sources and threads follow-up questions.

tools.name: Google AI Studio
tools.summary: Build and test prompts and models in Google’s API-oriented workspace.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.summary: In-editor and CLI suggestions trained for software workflows inside GitHub.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.summary: AI-native editor built on familiar IDE patterns with model choice and project context.

tools.name: Replit AI
tools.summary: Cloud IDE with built-in assist for build, run, and deploy in one place.

tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.summary: Generative models for image and text effects in Adobe’s commercial-safe workflow.

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.summary: Generative and editing features inside the Canva design product.

tools.name: Figma AI
tools.summary: Design assistance and automation inside the Figma editor.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.summary: In-workspace writing, Q&A, and autofill for notes and team wikis.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.summary: Generates presentable documents and slide decks from prompts.

tools.name: Otter.ai
tools.summary: Meeting transcription, summaries, and search across conversations.

tools.name: Motion
tools.summary: AI planning that builds schedules, tasks, and calendaring from your priorities and deadlines.

tools.name: Reclaim
tools.summary: Defends your calendar, auto-schedules focus and meetings, and syncs to common work apps.

tools.name: Linear
tools.summary: Issue tracking and roadmaps with strong defaults and in-product assist for product teams.

tools.name: ClickUp
tools.summary: Tasks, docs, goals, and time in one workspace, with a dedicated AI feature set for drafting and Q&A.

tools.name: Asana (AI features)
tools.summary: Work management with in-product help for status, field suggestions, and clarity on projects.

tools.name: monday.com
tools.summary: Boards and products for work with AI to generate views, text, and summaries in context.

tools.name: Notion (workspace)
tools.summary: Databases, wikis, and roadmaps; pair with Notion AI for project docs and team spaces.

tools.name: Runway
tools.summary: Generative video, images, and motion inside a browser-based creative suite for teams and solo work.

tools.name: Pika
tools.summary: Text-to-video and style-driven clips from prompts with a focused creation flow.

tools.name: Descript
tools.summary: Edit by transcript, multitrack audio, screen capture, and overdub in one timeline.

tools.name: CapCut (with AI tools)
tools.summary: Edit on web or device with generative and assistive tools for short-form and story videos.

tools.name: InVideo AI
tools.summary: Script, scene, and voice from prompts; aimed at quick marketing and explainer output.

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.summary: Create presenter-led videos with avatars and many languages, common for L&D and internal comms.

tools.name: Suno
tools.summary: Generate full songs and stems from text prompts, shareable in the public feed.

tools.name: Udio
tools.summary: Text-to-music and vocal experiments with a browser studio and community focus.

tools.name: Adobe speech enhancement (Podcast)
tools.summary: Clean and enhance dialogue recordings; useful for podcasts, interviews, and voice-overs before edit.

tools.name: LANDR
tools.summary: Mastering, distribution, and creative assist aimed at bedroom producers and small teams.

tools.name: Arduino (IDE & ecosystem)
tools.summary: Official platform for Uno, Nano, and compatibles: IDE, board docs, and libraries to program microcontrollers.

tools.name: Tinkercad
tools.summary: Browser 3D design, code blocks, and basic circuits; common first step for beginners and classes.

tools.name: Wokwi
tools.summary: Simulate Arduino, ESP32, and parts in the browser; fast iteration before you flash hardware.

tools.name: Flux (PCB with AI assist)
tools.summary: Collaborative PCB and schematic in the browser, with in-product help for part choices and layout.

tools.name: SnapEDA
tools.summary: Search symbols, footprints, and 3D models, then move into KiCad and other ECAD tools.

tools.name: Fritzing
tools.summary: Breadboard, schematic, and board view for teaching and small Arduino projects (desktop app).

tools.name: KiCad
tools.summary: Open source PCB suite: schematic, layout, 3D viewer, and manufacturing outputs without license fees.

tools.name: EasyEDA (incl. LCSC)
tools.summary: In-browser EDA, parts, and a path to cheap prototypes with common Asian fabs.
